author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kimi ga Shinu made Koi wo Shitai' Reveals Additional Cast Pair, Theme Songs, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Nachi Aono's Kimi ga Shinu made Koi wo Shitai (I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day) manga revealed an additional pair of cast, theme songs, the second promotional video, and second key visual (pictured). The anime is scheduled to premiere on AT-X at 9.30 p.m. on July 7, followed by broadcasts on Tokyo MX, BS11, and WOWOW. Voice actresses Yumi Uchiyama (Koori Zokusei Danshi to Cool na Douryou Joshi) and Ai Kayano (Ano Hi Mita Han...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Clevatess II' Reveals Additional Cast Pair, Opening Theme, Third Promo
The official website for the Clevatess II: Majuu no Ou to Itsuwari no Yuusha Denshou (Clevatess Season 2) television anime revealed an additional pair of cast, the opening theme, and a third promotional video on Tuesday. The second season is scheduled to premiere on July 8 at 10:30 p.m. on Tokyo MX, followed by other channels. Voice actors Tomokazu Sugita (JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken (TV)) and Megumi Han (Hunter x Hunter (2011)) will be joining the cast as Laswell and Zavthier, respectively. Singer...

text:
'Futsutsuka na Akujo dewa Gozaimasu ga' Reveals Additional Cast, Opening Theme, Second Promo
The official website of the television anime adaptation of Satsuki Nakamura's Futsutsuka na Akujo dewa Gozaimasu ga: Suuguu Chouso Torikae Den (Though I Am an Inept Villainess: Tale of the Butterfly-Rat Body Swap in the Maiden Court) light novel revealed additional cast, the opening theme, and a second promotional video on Tuesday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 12 at 11:45 p.m. on TV Tokyo, TV Osaka, TV Aichi, and other stations. Cast Kou Kenshuu: Rei Igarashi (Higashi...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Dengeki Daisy' Gets TV Anime Adaptation in 2027
Production company Aniplex opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Kyousuke Motomi's Dengeki Daisy manga on Tuesday, revealing the main staff and a teaser visual (pictured). The anime series will begin airing in 2027. Staff Director: Souta Ueno (Gimai Seikatsu, Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.) Series Composition: Sawako Hirabayashi (Tsuma, Shougakusei ni Naru., Ookami Shoujo to Kuro Ouji) Character Design: Ayaka Murakami (Binan Koukou Chikyuu Bouei-bu Haikara!, Sasaki...
